comments.body:
Hello Reena,

Thank you for sharing the store details.

I have checked the order #B51819 and the label is failed with the below error - `Insufficient account balance`


    <sdcerror code="00560101" xmlns="http://stamps.com/xml/namespace/2008/01/fault">Insufficient account balance. Account exception Exception with code 0x00560101; module 86, category 1, item 1 </sdcerror> <authenticator xmlns="http://stamps.com/xml/namespace/2008/01/fault">exp=1775250296&uid=21179524&cty=swsim&ctk=ugS6ETncV0ItyPLHIiWMISA4LK8=&iid=Kwq4kqGOOEKw7zt6UH1rzQ==&eac=1484391710&eacx=294347778&eac3=1083060835&raid=70000000003145949&pexp=0&pl=2147483647&ast=3&ipaddr=104.131.98.127&ace=1774649096&appcapsx=WHoFHhGLZAJAjjJjEgBIAwAAEBAAAAWI&mac=AhGyM69NWYn3BE2IYFXtysmdkTE= </authenticator>
Could you please confirm if you have updated the Stamps USPS account with the credit?

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Regards,

Sibi Firoz
Team PluginHive

US Customer using the MCSL-S app with UPS, FedEx and Stamps USPS.
Customer has an order #B51819, which has 2 packages. Customer tried generating the labels using Stamps USPS but label for one package failed due to insufficient balance. The order is now in Label Failed Status in app.
We are not able to CleanUp the order as the CleanUp button is missing, or use Cancel Shipment to reset the order.

Please check and reset the order in the app.
